case_title: MARJORIE MURPHY CAMPBELL VS. JOY WOO-RODRIGUES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,027.05 FILED BY CAMPBELL, MARJORIE MURPHY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO-RODRIGUES, JOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED OCT-04-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOO-RODRIGUES, JOY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ZADIK SHAPIRO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ZADIK SHAPIRO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, MARJORIE MURPHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO-RODRIGUES, JOY $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,090.00 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-15-2014 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
